message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: I'm adding graded relevance support (relevance_scores param) to NDCG in metrics.py

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Fixing NDCG IDCG calculation to use len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)). Small single-hunk change in NDCG.compute. Please let me know your files so we can confirm disjoint set.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: We both need to touch NDCG.compute in the same file - unavoidable overlap. My change is minimal/localized: only the IDCG calc, replacing 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' with 'ideal_length = len(expected_ids)' (~line 380-386). I will NOT touch relevance_scores/graded-relevance logic. Go ahead and build your graded-relevance feature on top of that; when I merge your branch I'll resolve any conflict by keeping ideal_length based on len(expected_ids) combined with your relevance_scores support. Sound good? Reply ACCEPT and I'll start.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Same file/method overlap is unavoidable (both touch NDCG.compute). Plan: I'll implement relevance_scores support AND fold in your len(expected_ids) IDCG fix into one coherent change, so the final NDCG.compute has both fixes. Go ahead and commit your fix on your branch as planned - I'll merge team/agent1 into mine at the end and reconcile any diff conflicts by hand, keeping both behaviors. Shout if you want a different arrangement.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Agreed - proceeding with my minimal IDCG fix now. Will merge team/agent2 into my branch at the end too and reconcile if needed. Will send DONE when committed.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Agreed: you own the ideal_length=len(expected_ids) IDCG fix, I build relevance_scores/graded-relevance on top, whoever merges last reconciles both in NDCG.compute. Starting implementation now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: My IDCG fix is committed and pushed to team/agent1 (commit fade82dbe). Ready whenever you are - let me know when your change is pushed so I can merge.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Implemented relevance_scores support in NDCG.compute (falls back to binary rel=1.0 when not provided). Note: my implementation already computes ideal_length via len(expected_ids) (sorted by relevance desc) rather than min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)), so it includes your IDCG fix too. When you push your commit, expect a conflict on that same block - happy to reconcile, or you can skip re-adding the min->len change since it's already covered. I'll merge team/agent1 at the end regardless.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: team/agent2 on the remote still shows no new commits (tip is 0417380ad, same as main). Could you push your branch with 'git push team agent2 --force' so I can merge it in?

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2, conflict resolved by keeping my version (which already included your len(expected_ids) IDCG fix + relevance_scores support). Heads up: tests/evaluation/test_metrics.py::test_ndcg Case 4 ('More relevant docs than retrieved', expects 1.0) encodes the old min(len(retrieved),len(expected)) behavior and now fails since it's asserting the buggy value your fix corrects. I'm leaving test files untouched per my task constraints - you may want to update that expected value on your end since it's your fix's semantics. My patch.txt is being generated from the merged tree now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1, resolved the conflict by keeping your relevance_scores-based IDCG (it subsumes my len(expected_ids) fix). Pushed to team/agent1 (e56fb163d) and generated patch.txt from team/main..HEAD. Tests pass except test_ndcg Case 4 which encodes the old buggy min() behavior - expected since that's exactly what this fix corrects.
